headline: Start free. Pay only when you ship.
subheadline: The preview engine is free forever. Upgrade only when you need to keep the source code, unlock unlimited builds, or white-label the output for clients.

tiers.name: Preview
tiers.description: Generate and inspect full scrollable homepage mockups directly in the browser. No account, no credit card.
features: Unlimited preview generations
Four layout archetypes: SaaS, local service, creator, ecommerce
Open any preview in a new tab and share the HTML
Quality score and SEO keyword preview

tiers.name: Source Pack
tiers.description: Buy the exact source code behind a preview you like. Commercial license, delivered to your checkout email.
features: Production-ready index.html, content.json, README.md
Commercial license for the generated build
Reserved to your checkout email for 48 hours
Up to 3 downloads per purchase

tiers.name: Studio
tiers.description: Unlimited source packs for a single brand. Keep a history of every generation, iterate faster, and lock in a single seat.
features: Unlimited source pack downloads
Generation history with redownload
Priority render queue when remote AI is enabled
Custom brand tokens: palette, accent, primary CTA defaults
Cancel anytime — all previously issued packs stay yours

tiers.name: Agency
tiers.description: Built for teams shipping client sites. White-label the output, collaborate, and keep a central library of brand kits.
features: Everything in Studio
Up to 5 team seats with shared library
White-label output (strip all VoiceToWebsite branding)
Client-ready brand kits and reusable templates
Priority email support within 1 business day

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: Self-hosted deployment, governance review, custom templates, and hands-on onboarding for larger teams.
features: Self-hosted or VPC deployment path
SSO, audit logging, and security review
Custom templates tailored to your design system
Dedicated onboarding + priority support SLA
Volume pricing on source packs

faq.question: Is the preview really free and unlimited?
faq.answer: Yes. The preview engine runs entirely in your browser — there is no per-request cost on our side, so you can iterate as much as you want without signing up.

faq.question: What do I actually get with a Source Pack?
faq.answer: A downloadable bundle with the full generated index.html, a structured content.json, and a README. It is production-ready and you own the commercial license for that build.

faq.question: How is Studio different from buying packs one at a time?
faq.answer: Studio is for anyone generating more than one site per month. You get unlimited packs, history, priority queuing, and brand defaults — it pays for itself after the second build.

faq.question: Does Agency include white-label rights?
faq.answer: Yes. On Agency and above, VoiceToWebsite branding is stripped from the generated source so you can hand it directly to clients as your own work.

faq.question: Can I upgrade or cancel any time?
faq.answer: Yes. Subscriptions are month-to-month, prorated on upgrade, and you keep every pack you already downloaded even after cancellation.

cta.heading: Generate the preview first. Pay only when you want to keep it.
cta.body: The fastest path to a real answer: open the generator, paste a brief, and see whether the output is worth $49 before spending a dollar.
